allow: Bash(php artisan tinker --execute='$devices = App\\Models\\Device::where\(""company_id"", 2\)->get\([""id"", ""device_type"", ""name"", ""location""]\); foreach\($devices as $d\) { echo ""ID: "" . $d->id . "" | Type: "" . $d->device_type . "" | Name: "" . $d->name . ""\\n""; } echo ""Total: "" . $devices->count\(\);')

Bash(php artisan tinker --execute='$count = App\\Models\\AttendanceLog::where\(""company_id"", 2\)->count\(\); echo ""Total logs: $count\\n""; $recent = App\\Models\\AttendanceLog::where\(""company_id"", 2\)->orderBy\(""LogTime"", ""desc""\)->first\(\); echo ""Latest: "" . \($recent ? $recent->LogTime : ""NONE""\) . ""\\n""; $withDevice = App\\Models\\AttendanceLog::where\(""company_id"", 2\)->whereHas\(""device"", function\($q\) { $q->whereIn\(""device_type"", [""all"", ""Access Control""]\); }\)->count\(\); echo ""With AC/all device: $withDevice\\n""; $recentAC = App\\Models\\AttendanceLog::where\(""company_id"", 2\)->whereHas\(""device"", function\($q\) { $q->whereIn\(""device_type"", [""all"", ""Access Control""]\); }\)->orderBy\(""LogTime"", ""desc""\)->first\(\); echo ""Latest AC: "" . \($recentAC ? $recentAC->LogTime : ""NONE""\);')
